messages.content: References [9] and [10] present the application of open winding excitation for VFRM with dual-inverter, the relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage and the maximum voltage is presented.

[9] J. Zhang, X. Liu, Z. Qian and W. Kang, "New Concept and Constraints for Dual-Inverter-Fed Open-End Winding Machine," in IEEE Transactions on Power Electronics, vol. 32, no. 3, pp. 1900-1919, March 2017, doi: 10.1109/TPEL.2016.2567995.

[10] J. Zhang, X. Liu, Z. Qian and W. Kang, "Zero-Sequence Voltage Induced Constraints for Dual-Inverter-Fed Open-End Winding Machine," in IEEE Transactions on Power Electronics, vol. 32, no. 9, pp. 6964-6977, Sept. 2017, doi: 10.1109/TPEL.2016.2647468.

References [9] and [10] present the application of open winding excitation for VFRM with dual-inverter, the relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage and the maximum voltage is presented.帮我修改语言和语法错误

References [9] and [10] discuss the application of open winding excitation for Variable Flux Reluctance Machines (VFRM) using a dual-inverter setup. These references explore the relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage, and the maximum voltage.

References [9] and [10] present the application of open winding excitation for VFRM with dual-inverter, the relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage and the maximum voltage is presented.翻译
参考文献[9]和[10]介绍了利用双逆变器进行VFRM的开端绕组励磁的应用，展示了dq轴电压、零序电压和最大电压之间的关系。
参考文献[9]和[10]基于双逆变器对VFRM进行开端绕组励磁控制，给出了dq轴电压、零序电压和最大电压之间的关系。

That translation is correct:

References [9] and [10] present the application of open winding excitation for VFRM with a dual-inverter. They provide insights on the relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage, and the maximum voltage.
参考文献[9]和[10]基于双逆变器对VFRM进行开端绕组励磁控制，给出了dq轴电压、零序电压和最大电压之间的关系。 翻译成英文

References [9] and [10] discuss the application of open winding excitation for Variable Flux Reluctance Machines (VFRM) using a dual-inverter configuration. They provide insights into the relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage, and the maximum voltage.

In [11] a three-phase four-leg drive with asymmetrical neutral leg for dc-biased vernier reluctance machine is proposed. The maximum fundamental amplitude of the phase voltage can reach 0.5774Udc. However, the modulation range of the zero-sequence voltage is not considered.

[11] presents a three-phase four-leg drive with an asymmetrical neutral leg for a dc-biased vernier reluctance machine. The study shows that the maximum fundamental amplitude of the phase voltage can reach 0.5774Udc. However, the modulation range of the zero-sequence voltage is not considered in this study.
除了前面所述的双逆变器拓扑外，四桥臂拓扑也可以提供零序回路。 翻译
In addition to the previously mentioned dual-inverter topology, the four-bridge arm topology can also provide a zero-sequence path.

In [11] a three-phase four-leg drive with asymmetrical neutral leg for dc-biased vernier reluctance machine is proposed. The maximum fundamental amplitude of the phase voltage can reach 0.5774Udc. However, the modulation range of the zero-sequence voltage is not considered. In [12], a four-leg DC-biased vernier reluctance machine with an open winding configuration is discussed. It also establishes the utilization of the DC-link voltage by employing the principle of volt-second balance. The derivation of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in the above study is all based on the open-winding structure. 翻译
在[11]中，提出了一种用于直流偏置齿槽互感霍尔电机的三相四腿驱动方案，其中具有不对称中性腿。相电压的最大基波幅值可达到0.5774Udc。然而，该研究未考虑零序电压的调制范围。在[12]中，讨论了一种具有四腿结构且采用开路绕组配置的直流偏置齿槽互感霍尔电机。它还通过应用电压-秒平衡原理来利用直流链路电压。以上研究中关于直流链路电压利用或调制范围的推导都是基于开路绕组结构的。
在[11]中，提出了一种用于直流偏置游标磁阻电机的非对称三相四桥臂驱动方案。相电压的最大基波幅值可达0.5774Udc。然而，该研究未考虑零序电压的调制范围。在[12]中，讨论了一种具有四桥臂结构且采用开路绕组配置的直流偏置游标磁阻电机驱动拓扑。它还通过应用电压-秒平衡原理来推导直流链路电压利用率。以上研究中关于直流链路电压利用率或调制范围的推导都是基于开路绕组结构。翻译成英文

In [11], a three-phase four-bridge arm drive with an asymmetrical neutral leg is proposed for a DC-biased vernier reluctance machine. The maximum fundamental amplitude of the phase voltage can reach 0.5774Udc. However, the modulation range of the zero-sequence voltage is not considered in this study. 

In [12], a four-bridge arm topology is discussed for a DC-biased vernier reluctance machine with an open-winding configuration. It also utilizes the principle of volt-second balance to derive the utilization of the DC-link voltage. The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in the aforementioned studies are all based on the open-winding structure.

The DC-link voltage utilization in a VFRM drive system excited by zero-sequence current. it is necessary to take into account both the dq-axis voltages and the zero-sequence voltage. A 120° phase shift SVPWM is utilized for open winding DC-biased vernier reluctance machines in [8], the range of the synthesized voltage vector reduces from the maximum hexagon to the middle hexagon. However, the constraint relationship between the zero-sequence voltage and dq-axis voltages with the DC-link voltage is not considered. References [9] and [10] discuss the application of open winding excitation for VFRM using a dual-inverter configuration. The relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage, and the maximum voltage was presented. In addition to the previously mentioned dual-inverter topology, the four-leg inverter can also provide a zero-sequence path. In [11], a three-phase four-leg drive with an asymmetrical neutral leg is proposed for a DC-biased vernier reluctance machine. The maximum fundamental amplitude of the phase voltage can reach 0.5774Udc. However, the modulation range of the zero-sequence voltage is not considered in this study. In [12], a four-leg drive topology is discussed for a DC-biased vernier reluctance machine with an open-winding configuration. It also utilizes the principle of volt-second balance to derive the DC-link voltage utilization. The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in the aforementioned studies are all based on the open-winding structure.帮我纠正语法和语言错误

The utilization of the DC-link voltage in a VFRM drive system excited by zero-sequence current requires consideration of both the dq-axis voltages and the zero-sequence voltage. In [8], a 120° phase shift SVPWM is utilized for open winding DC-biased vernier reluctance machines, which reduces the range of the synthesized voltage vector from the maximum hexagon to the middle hexagon. However, the constraint relationship between the zero-sequence voltage, dq-axis voltages, and the DC-link voltage is not considered.

References [9] and [10] discuss the application of open winding excitation for VFRM using a dual-inverter configuration. They present the relationship between dq-axis voltages, zero-sequence voltage, and the maximum voltage. In addition to the dual-inverter topology, the four-leg inverter can also provide a zero-sequence path.

In [11], a three-phase four-leg drive with an asymmetrical neutral leg is proposed for a DC-biased vernier reluctance machine. The maximum fundamental amplitude of the phase voltage can reach 0.5774Udc. However, the modulation range of the zero-sequence voltage is not considered in this study.

In [12], a four-leg drive topology is discussed for a DC-biased vernier reluctance machine with an open-winding configuration. It also utilizes the principle of volt-second balance to derive the utilization of the DC-link voltage. The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in the aforementioned studies are all based on the open-winding structure.
In [12], a four-leg converter drive topology with series armature winding is discussed with an open-winding configuration.我纠正语法和语言错误
In [12], a drive topology with a four-leg converter and series armature winding is discussed, utilizing an open-winding configuration.
The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in the aforementioned studies are all based on the open-winding structure.纠正语法和语言错误
The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in the aforementioned studies are all based on the open-winding structure.
The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in the aforementioned studies are all based on the open-winding structure. 翻译
以上研究中关于直流链路电压利用率或调制范围的推导都基于开路绕组结构。
The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in these studies are all based on the open-winding structure.纠正语法和语言错误
The derivations of the DC link voltage utilization or modulation range in these studies are all based on the open-winding structure.

In addition to the dual inverter open winding, there are many other circuits that can provide zero sequence current. In recent years, various topologies have been proposed for providing neutral connection and controlling zero-sequence voltage [13-18]. One solution is the four-leg converter, which functions as a three-phase voltage source converter with a dedicated neutral leg [13][14][15]. This converter can generate zero-sequence voltage to effectively manage the resulting neutral current. Recommendations have also been made regarding the modulation range for this type of converter. A method described in [16][17] calculates the modulation range of the maximum d-q-0 voltages based on the specified DC link voltage. However, it is based on carrier-based pulse width modulation (PWM) strategy. Another approach, as explained in [18], involves a dual-inverter with open-winding topology, deriving the relationship between harmonic suppression range and modulation coefficient of armature voltage through adjustable upper and lower bounds of the tertiary harmonic zero-sequence voltage.翻译

除了双逆变器的开路绕组之外，还有许多其他电路可以提供零序电流。近年来，针对提供中性连接和控制零序电压，提出了各种拓扑结构 [13-18]。其中一种解决方案是四桥臂变流器，其作为三相电压源变流器具有专用的中性桥臂 [13] [14] [15]。该变流器可以生成零序电压，有效管理产生的中性电流。对这种类型的变流器还有关于调制范围的建议。在 [16] [17] 中描述的一种方法，根据指定的直流链路电压计算最大d-q-0电压的调制范围，但它基于载波脉宽调制（PWM）策略。另一种方法，正如[18]所解释的，涉及到具有开路绕组拓扑的双逆变器，通过可调节的三次谐波零序电压的上下限，推导出谐波抑制范围与电枢电压调制系数的关系。
The DC-link voltage utilization in the machine drive system excited by zero-sequence current requires consideration of both the dq-axis voltages and the zero-sequence voltage. 翻译
在由零序电流激励的机器驱动系统中，直流链路电压的利用需要考虑dq轴电压和零序电压的因素。
在有零序电流调节能力的电机驱动系统中，直流链路电压的利用率需要考虑dq轴电压和零序电压的因素。翻译成英文
In a motor drive system with the ability to regulate zero-sequence current, the utilization of the DC-link voltage needs to consider both the dq-axis voltages and the zero-sequence voltage.

Another approach, as explained in [18], involves a dual-inverter with open-winding topology, deriving the relationship between harmonic suppression range and modulation coefficient of armature voltage through adjustable upper and lower bounds of the tertiary harmonic zero-sequence voltage. 翻译
另一种方法，正如[18]中所解释的，涉及到具有开路绕组拓扑的双逆变器，通过可调节的三次谐波零序电压的上下限，推导出谐波抑制范围与电枢电压调制系数的关系。
